pendingApplications.address: Land West Of London Road Handcross West Sussex
pendingApplications.proposal: Outline planning application (with all matters reserved except for access) for the erection of up to 55 dwellings, including affordable homes, together with green and blue infrastructure, vehicular access from London Road, pedestrian/cycle access from London Road, the provision of utility services structures and the demolition of an existing agricultural building.

pendingApplications.address: Land At Junction Of Blackwell Farm Road And Holtye Road East Grinstead West Sussex
pendingApplications.proposal: To modify the Planning Obligation by way of Agreement pursuant to Section 106 relating to land at Blackwell Farm Road, East Grinstead dated 3 March 2022 under Second Schedule Part Two: Affordable Housing Scheme (on page 29) from 7 units to be delivered for affordable rent and 3 units for shared ownership to 10 units to be delivered for affordable rent.

pendingApplications.address: Land At And Adjacent To The Former Sewage Treatment Works Fairbridge Way Burgess Hill West Sussex RH15 8BF
pendingApplications.proposal: Non Material Amendment to application DM/19/1895 - At RMA stage, 62 of the 307 homes (20%) were identified as being delivered in compliance with M4(2) Accessible and Adaptable dwellings. This application seeks approval to revise the specific plots designated as M4(2), without altering the total number required by the original planning consent. There will be one Plot swap included which is the removal of 202 and the inclusion of 258.

pendingApplications.address: 50 Cuckfield Road Hurstpierpoint Hassocks West Sussex BN6 9SB
pendingApplications.proposal: Demolition of an existing garage and erection of a proposed new granny annexe for the primary purpose of assisting an older person with less than full mobility and ancillary to the main C3 dwellinghouse.

pendingApplications.address: Land To The South Of Reeds Lane Reeds Lane Sayers Common West Sussex
pendingApplications.proposal: Scoping Opinion for the development of up to 2,000 homes, community uses, employment, public open space and infrastructure including primary and secondary schools.

pendingApplications.address: Land To The R/o Central House 25 Perrymount Road Haywards Heath West Sussex RH16 3XL
pendingApplications.proposal: Erection of a 7- storey building comprising 30 flats (18 x 1 bed and 12 x 2 bed) with associated landscaping, parking and refuse stores. UPDATED ecology report received 26/05/2026 and FRA and drainage strategy received 15/06/2026.
